messages.label: error

exceptions.message: Failed to authenticate on SMTP server with username "apikey" using the following authenticators: "LOGIN", "PLAIN". Authenticator "LOGIN" returned "Expected response code "235" but got code "451", with message "451 Authentication failed: Maximum credits exceeded".". Authenticator "PLAIN" returned "Expected response code "235" but got empty code.".
